_meta.description: Action-coverage prompts for the agent preset (the shipping default). One prompt per tool+action in the 21-tool core read/write surface.
_meta.pass_criteria: Tool called with correct action param, no cross-action param bleed

prompts.prompt: Find all notes mentioning Acme Corp's data migration timeline
prompts.notes: Default text search, no action param needed

prompts.prompt: Find notes similar to the Data Migration Playbook
prompts.notes: Requires init_semantic; fallback to text search acceptable

prompts.prompt: Show me the full contents of the Acme Corp client note
prompts.notes: Escalation from search to full read

prompts.prompt: Show me just the Revenue History section from the Acme Corp note
prompts.notes: Section-level read

prompts.prompt: Which notes have a section called 'Risks' or 'Risk Assessment'?
prompts.notes: Cross-vault heading search

prompts.prompt: Add a bullet to today's daily note Log section: '- **14:30** Called Sarah Mitchell to discuss cutover timeline'
prompts.notes: Append to section

prompts.prompt: In the Acme Data Migration project note, overwrite the 'Phase' section contents with this text (use vault_replace_in_section to perform the replacement, do not just read it): 'Phase 4 — Production cutover complete. All systems live.'
prompts.notes: Section replacement. Directive phrasing is intentional: LLMs in non-interactive mode over-investigate before mutating; the prompt has to explicitly request the write step for the test to measure the mutation tool rather than the read path.

prompts.prompt: Create a new client note at clients/Pinnacle Systems.md with frontmatter type: client, status: prospect, industry: logistics. Go ahead and create the file — it does not exist yet, no need to search first.
prompts.notes: New note creation. Explicit path + 'no need to search first' suppresses the investigate-before-mutate loop.

prompts.prompt: Move the Discovery Workshop Template from knowledge/ to templates/
prompts.notes: File move

prompts.prompt: Rename 'GlobalBank API Audit' to 'GlobalBank API Security Audit'
prompts.notes: File rename

prompts.prompt: Delete the Cloud Strategy Template note using the note tool with action:"delete" and confirm:true. I've already decided to remove it — execute the deletion, don't ask for confirmation.
prompts.notes: File deletion. Claude Code's destructive-action aversion otherwise blocks the delete; the prompt has to carry the confirm:true hint and explicit 'execute' directive to reach the mutation path.

prompts.prompt: Remember that Sarah Mitchell prefers email over phone for status updates
prompts.notes: Store a preference. Skipped for Claude Code: the MCP memory tool is suppressed when CLAUDECODE=1 (collision with Claude Code's native memory plane). Set FW_ENABLE_MEMORY_FOR_CLAUDE=1 to re-enable and run this test.

prompts.prompt: What do you remember about Sarah Mitchell's communication preferences?
prompts.notes: Search stored memories. Skipped for Claude Code (memory plane collision, see memory_store).

prompts.prompt: List all memories you've stored about my clients
prompts.notes: Browse memories. Skipped for Claude Code (memory plane collision, see memory_store).

prompts.prompt: Give me a quick briefing — what's been happening in this vault recently?
prompts.notes: Session startup context. Routes through the standalone brief tool (not suppressed), so it remains runnable for Claude Code.

prompts.prompt: Forget whatever you stored about Sarah Mitchell's preferences
prompts.notes: Delete a memory. Skipped for Claude Code (memory plane collision, see memory_store).

prompts.prompt: Show me all open tasks across my vault
prompts.notes: Task listing

prompts.prompt: Add a task to the Acme Data Migration note: 'Schedule cutover dry-run with Marcus Webb 📅 2026-04-15'
prompts.notes: Task creation; may use vault_add_task

prompts.prompt: Mark the 'Chase payment' task as done on the Acme Corp client note
prompts.notes: Task completion; may use vault_toggle_task

prompts.prompt: Check if my planned edit to the Acme Corp note follows vault policies
prompts.notes: Policy validation
